---
title: "Appendix — Bibliography"
nocite: |
  @*
format:
  html:
    include-in-header:
      text: |
        <meta http-equiv="Cache-Control" content="no-cache, no-store, must-revalidate">
        <meta http-equiv="Pragma" content="no-cache">
        <meta http-equiv="Expires" content="0">
---

Canonical source metadata lives in [`data/bibliography.yaml`](https://github.com/nvavrock/medallion/blob/main/data/bibliography.yaml). In research prose, cite with Pandoc syntax: `[@key]`.

::: {#refs}
:::
